authority: Vitest 4 Browser Mode through Playwright Chromium plus independent SessionStore/.mlt truth
forbidden_substitutions: automated DOM checks represented as VoiceOver assessment

scenarios.proof: actual App loading and typed failure states
named transport controls update the master clock and audio state
ARIA tabs select action-backed panels and collapse/reopen
real toolbar input announces history/save and dirty state
StrictMode remount/unmount balances listeners and disposes clock state
console/error/rejection fail-closed setup is active
named region/toolbar/listbox/groups/options and disabled structural items
one roving tab stop and selection follows focus
Left/Right remain in the current track
Up/Down use nearest compatible center with earlier tie-break
track and whole-timeline Home/End are deterministic
Space, B, N, undo, redo, and save use product paths
Enter and Tab/Shift+Tab expose body/head/tail mode
move, slip, slide, and compatible-track move use canonical invocations
trim, ripple trim, roll, and missing-neighbor limitation are canonical
vertical edit move preserves time and never crosses video/audio kind
keyboard uses pointer snap candidates and announces a held hard bound once
keyup/500ms bursts create one transaction and Escape exactly cancels
selection/edit/error/history/save announcements are typed and deterministic
commit/cancel/split/removal policies retain or restore semantic focus
keyboard calls the existing gesture invocation builder for every modifier family
real browser invocation is reapplied through SessionStore and independently parsed/hashed
axe has zero blocking machine-detectable violations

negative_controls.mutation: reverse real ArrowDown compatible-track direction in viewer product source
remove the real clip option accessible name in viewer product source
